metadata.title: Fix Interview Status Tracking & Dashboard Display

story.iWant: the dashboard to accurately count my interviews and see each interview's status
story.soThat: I have a reliable overview of my job search activity

task.title: Add status column to interviews table
task.subtask: Create migration 000018_add_interview_status.up.sql — ALTER TABLE interviews ADD COLUMN status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled' with CHECK constraint for values: scheduled, completed, cancelled
Create corresponding 000018_add_interview_status.down.sql to drop the column
Backfill existing rows — set status = 'completed' WHERE outcome IS NOT NULL, leave others as scheduled

task.title: Update backend Interview model and repository
task.subtask: Add Status string field to Interview struct in backend/internal/models/interview.go

Add status to all SELECT column lists in backend/internal/repository/interview.go — affects CreateInterview (line 37), GetInterviewByID (line 76), GetInterviewsByApplicationID (line 162), GetInterviewsByUser (line 181), GetInterviewWithApplicationInfo (line 207), GetInterviewsWithApplicationInfo (line 313)
Add status to INSERT columns in CreateInterview, defaulting to 'scheduled'
Add optional Status *string to UpdateInterviewRequest in backend/internal/handlers/interview.go (line 27) with validation against allowed values
Update UpdateInterview handler to persist status changes

task.title: Fix dashboard interview count
task.subtask: In backend/internal/repository/dashboard_repository.go, add a separate COUNT query against interviews table: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interviews WHERE user_id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
Replace InterviewCount: statusCounts["interview"] (line 118) with the actual interview record count
Consider also initializing "draft" in statusCounts map (line 88-94) per advisory note from Story 9.1 review

task.title: Auto-set application status on interview creation
task.subtask: In CreateInterview handler (backend/internal/handlers/interview.go line 61), after creating the interview, look up the parent application's current status
If current status is Draft, Saved, or Applied, call applicationRepo.GetApplicationStatusIDByName("Interview") then applicationRepo.UpdateApplicationStatus() to set it to "Interview"
If current status is Interview, Offer, or Rejected, do NOT downgrade/change — skip the auto-update
InterviewHandler already has applicationRepo field (line 41), so no new dependency injection is needed

task.title: Update frontend Interview type and display
task.subtask: Add status: string to Interview interface in frontend/src/services/interview-service.ts (line 62)

Update interview list table status column (frontend/src/app/(app)/interviews/interview-table/columns.tsx lines 185-198) to show actual status field with badge colors: scheduled=blue, completed=green, cancelled=gray
Add "Awaiting Outcome" display logic — if status === 'scheduled' and scheduled_date is in the past and no outcome, show amber "Awaiting Outcome" badge
Update interview card list (frontend/src/components/interview-list/interview-card-list.tsx) to show status badge
Update interview detail view (frontend/src/components/interview-detail/details-card.tsx) to show status in the details grid
Update application detail timeline (frontend/src/app/(app)/applications/[id]/page.tsx lines 93-102) to show interview status in subtitle
Update needs-feedback-section.tsx to use status field alongside existing date-based logic

task.title: Testing
task.subtask: Backend integration tests require PostgreSQL — verify code compiles and logic is correct by review
Frontend tests — update interview service mocks to include status field
Verify dashboard stat card shows correct interview count (manual test)
Verify all existing tests pass with new interview status field — run pnpm test in frontend
Test auto-status transition: create interview for Draft/Saved/Applied app → verify app status becomes "Interview"
Test no-downgrade: create interview for Offer app → verify app status stays "Offer"

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Given the dashboard stats endpoint, when interview count is returned, then it reflects the actual number of interview records from the interviews table (not just applications with "Interview" status)
Given a user creates a new interview for an application, when the interview is saved, then the parent application's status is automatically set to "Interview" (if currently Draft, Saved, or Applied)
Given an interview exists, when displayed in the application detail view, then it shows a status indicator (scheduled, completed, cancelled) alongside the date
Given the interview model, when an interview's scheduled date is in the past and no outcome is recorded, then it displays as "Awaiting Outcome"
Given the interview model, when an outcome is recorded, then the interview displays as "Completed" with the outcome value

doc.title: Epic 9: Bug Fixes & Core Workflow Stability
doc.snippet: Defines ACs, tasks, edge cases, and technical notes for interview status tracking and dashboard count fix. Dashboard InterviewCount is statusCounts['interview'] — count of applications, not interviews.

doc.title: Database Schema
doc.snippet: Interviews table with columns: id, user_id, application_id, round_number, interview_type, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, duration_minutes, outcome, overall_feeling, confidence_level. No status column currently exists.

doc.title: Database Schema
doc.snippet: Lookup table for application workflow statuses with UNIQUE constraint on name. Contains: Applied, Interviewing, Rejected, Accepted, Saved, Draft.

doc.title: Database Schema
doc.snippet: 17 migrations exist (000001-000017). Migration 000017 added Draft status. Next available migration number is 000018.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Gin HTTP framework with handler-repository pattern. Standardized ApiResponse envelope with Success/Error/FieldErrors. Interview routes under /api/interviews.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Backend: Go 1.24, Gin, sqlx, JWT auth. Frontend: Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, React Hook Form, Zod, Jest.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: JWT-based auth with 24h access tokens. Middleware extracts user_id from Bearer token. All endpoints require auth.

doc.title: Story 9.1 (Done)
doc.snippet: Learnings: updateApplicationStatus() added to application-service.ts:112-117. getApplicationStatuses() cached in application-service.ts:98-105. Draft badge variant added to badge.tsx:43-44. Migration 000017 used INSERT WHERE NOT EXISTS pattern.

file.reason: Interview model struct needs new Status field added. Currently has no status field — only Outcome (nullable free-text).
All CRUD operations for interviews. 6 SELECT queries need status column added to column lists. INSERT at line 37 needs status. UpdateInterview at line 93 uses dynamic map-based updates.
Interview CRUD handlers. CreateInterview at line 61 needs auto-status transition logic. UpdateInterview at line 187 needs status field support. UpdateInterviewRequest at line 27 needs Status field.
Bug location: line 118 sets InterviewCount from statusCounts['interview'] (application count, not interview count). Needs separate COUNT query against interviews table.
Existing method to update application status by ID. Proven working from Story 9.1.
Lookup status UUID by name string. Cached with 5-min TTL. Use to resolve 'Interview' status ID.
Frontend Interview type definition. Missing status field — needs status: string added.
Interview list table status column. Currently derives status from countdown/outcome. Needs to use new status field with appropriate badge colors.
Mobile/card view of interviews. Shows countdown badge. Needs interview status badge added.
Interview detail view with date/time/duration/type grid. Needs status field added to the details grid.
Filters interviews needing feedback (past date, no outcome). Should incorporate status field — if status=cancelled, exclude from needs-feedback.
Application detail timeline shows interview events. Subtitle currently shows only outcome. Should show interview status.
Dashboard displays interview_count from stats API. Will automatically reflect fix once backend returns correct count.

Badge component with variant system. Has existing variants for interview types, status indicators (today, soon, awaiting, overdue). New interview status variants (scheduled, completed, cancelled) needed.
From Story 9.1: cached status lookup and status update functions. Can be reused if frontend needs to programmatically update application status.

constraints.constraint: Handler-Repository pattern: handlers call repository methods, no direct DB access in handlers
Standardized API response envelope via pkg/response (Success, Error, Created, NoContent)
Soft deletes: all queries filter WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
Dynamic updates via map[string]any in UpdateInterview — add status to the map when provided
Dashboard stats are cached 5 minutes per user (statsCache). InvalidateCache already called by interview CRUD handlers.
Badge variants defined in badge.tsx using class-variance-authority (cva). Follow existing pill-style pattern for new variants.
"Awaiting Outcome" is a derived/computed display state (status=scheduled AND scheduled_date past AND outcome IS NULL). Computed in frontend, not stored in DB.
Application already at Offer/Rejected when new interview created — do NOT downgrade to Interview status
Multiple interviews per application — each has independent status; auto-transition only triggers on interview creation
Migration numbering: 000017 exists (Draft status). Next available is 000018.
Backend integration tests require PostgreSQL — verify correctness by code review. Frontend tests use Jest with pnpm test.

interface.name: UpdateApplicationStatus
interface.signature: func (r *ApplicationRepository) UpdateApplicationStatus(applicationID, userID, application_status_id uuid.UUID) error

interface.name: CreateInterview
interface.signature: POST /api/interviews — body: {application_id, interview_type, scheduled_date, scheduled_time?, duration_minutes?}

interface.name: UpdateInterview
interface.signature: PUT /api/interviews/:id — body: {scheduled_date?, scheduled_time?, duration_minutes?, interview_type?, outcome?, overall_feeling?, went_well?, could_improve?, confidence_level?, status?}

interface.name: GetStats
interface.signature: GET /api/dashboard/stats — returns DashboardStats with total_applications, active_applications, interview_count, offer_count, status_counts

tests.standards: Backend tests use Go testing with testify assertions and PostgreSQL test database (testutil/database.go for setup/teardown, testutil/fixtures.go for test data factories). Frontend tests use Jest with React Testing Library. Mocks are co-located in __tests__ directories. Run backend: go test ./... (requires PostgreSQL). Run frontend: pnpm test.

ideas.idea: Verify fetchStats returns interview count from interviews table, not statusCounts["interview"]
Test CreateInterview auto-transitions: Draft→Interview, Saved→Interview, Applied→Interview
Test no-downgrade: create interview when app status is Offer → status stays Offer
Test no-downgrade: create interview when app status is Rejected → status stays Rejected
Test interview list/card displays correct status badge (scheduled=blue, completed=green, cancelled=gray)
Test "Awaiting Outcome" badge appears when status=scheduled, date is past, no outcome
Test completed interview shows "Completed" with outcome value
Verify existing frontend tests pass with new status field in mocks (pnpm test)
